## Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)

---

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (data structure or implementation)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Build / CI update

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] clang-format produces no changes
- [ ] clang-tidy produces no new warnings
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`ctest --output-on-failure`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Public API functions marked `TR_NODISCARD TR_API`
- [ ] Public API functions documented with Doxygen `/** */` comments
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if new data structures added

---

## Testing

Describe how the changes were tested:

- [ ] Tested locally on Windows
- [ ] Tested locally on Linux
- [ ] New unit tests added — test count: ___
- [ ] Existing tests still pass

Any other information relevant to the reviewer.
